overview: This night-vision image captures a spotted wild cat, identified as a jaguar, walking through a grassy area in Belize. The photo was taken by a camera trap, a common tool used by ecologists to study and monitor carnivore populations in the region. The jaguar's movement was recorded as part of research projects focused on community cat conservation and monitoring habitat usage.
